files.text:
package example

object Decoder:
  def label(value: Any): String = value match
    case s: String => s
    case n: Int    => n.toString

package example

enum Direction:
  case North, South, East, West

object Compass:
  def label(d: Direction): String = d match
    case Direction.North => "N"
    case Direction.South => "S"
    case Direction.East  => "E"
    case Direction.West  => "W"

package example

object Decoder:
  def label(value: Any): String = value match
    case s: String => s
    case n: Int    => n.toString
    case _         => "unknown"
